definition: A tool made by humans to help us do work.
exampleSentence: A toaster is a machine that warms our bread.

definition: Helper tools made by humans to make life easier.
exampleSentence: We use technology like tablets to learn inside the classroom.

definition: An object we use to do a job.
exampleSentence: A pencil is a tool we use to draw picture shapes.

definition: Energy that makes machines work, like electricity.
exampleSentence: A vacuum cleaner needs power from a wall plug to clean.

definition: Able to think, choose, or solve problems.
exampleSentence: Miko is a smart robot because he can find his way around toys.
